body:
- Adds heating rate computations
 - Adds a visualization environment

Heating rates are averaged over columns (for the last block for clear sky cases), but plots have not been verified.
title: Add viz env and heating rate plots

body:
- Adds a zenith angle module
 - Includes plots in docs
 - Needs tests
title: Adds zenith angle module

body:
- Moves some variables, and corresponding error checking, to `AtmosphericState`

This simplifies some function interfaces but does add storage to the `AtmosphericState`, which may not be necessary.
title: Move some col_vars to `AtmosState`

body:
- Moves `t_sfc` into `AtmosState`
 - Moves `toa_src` out of `GasOptics`, since `toa_src` is more related to RTE than gas optics
title: Move `t_sfc` into `AtmosState`, and `toa_src` out of `GasOptics`
